message:
feat(raptorq): add proof-integrated decoding and conformance test suite

Decoder proof integration (decoder.rs):
- Add DecodeResultWithProof struct combining result with proof artifact
- Implement decode_with_proof() that captures DecodeProof explaining
  the full decode process including peeling trace and elimination steps
- Proof artifacts enable debugging and verification of decode correctness

Proof enum cleanup (proof.rs):
- Simplify From<&DecodeError> impl using Self:: prefix consistently
- Remove unnecessary intermediate variable bindings
- Remove unreachable wildcard match arm (all error variants handled)

Conformance test suite (tests.rs, bd-3h65):
- Add determinism verification tests for encoder/decoder
- known_vector_small_block: K=4, symbol_size=16, seed=42
- known_vector_medium_block: K=32, symbol_size=64, seed=12345
- Tests verify that same seed produces identical content hashes
- Ensures cross-run reproducibility for debugging and verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
